policies.text: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the scheduled show time are eligible for a 90% refund. A 10% convenience fee is deducted automatically.
Cancellations made between 2 and 24 hours before the show time are eligible for a 50% refund. The remaining 50% is non-refundable.
Cancellations made less than 2 hours before show time are not eligible for any refund under any circumstances.
Approved refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days to the original payment method used during booking.
UPI and wallet refunds are typically processed within 24 to 48 hours, while card and net banking refunds may take up to 7 business days depending on bank processing times.
A maximum of 10 tickets can be booked per transaction. Bulk bookings beyond this limit require customer support approval.
Once a ticket is booked, it cannot be modified, transferred, or exchanged for another show or date. Users must cancel and rebook if changes are needed.
All bookings are subject to seat availability at the time of payment confirmation. Holding seats without payment is not permitted.
Seat selection is allowed until 30 minutes before show start time. After that, seats are auto-assigned based on availability.
Recliner seats must be booked at least 1 hour before show time. These seats are not available for last-minute booking or walk-ins.
Seat allocation is strictly first-come, first-served and cannot be changed once payment is completed.
We accept UPI, debit cards, credit cards, net banking, and wallet payments. Cash payments are not supported for online bookings.
Payments must be completed within the session timeout window. Failed or incomplete payments will release reserved seats automatically.
Outside food and beverages are strictly prohibited inside cinema halls. However, food courts and in-seat ordering are available at select theaters.
Theaters may provide in-app food ordering services where available. Delivery timing is subject to theater operational constraints.
Children below 3 years of age may enter free of charge without a separate seat. Children aged 3 years and above require a full ticket.
Age restrictions may apply to certain movies based on certification (U, UA, A). Theater staff may request valid age proof.
The management reserves the right to deny entry or cancel bookings in case of policy violations, misconduct, or technical errors.
Show timings and availability are subject to change without prior notice due to operational or technical reasons.
All disputes are subject to local jurisdiction where the booking was made.
Student, senior citizen, and defense personnel discounts (10-20% off) are available only for tickets purchased at the box office with valid ID proof. Not applicable on online bookings.
Early bird discounts (15% off) apply for shows booked at least 3 days in advance. Offer cannot be combined with other promotional codes or loyalty points.
Members earn 5 loyalty points for every ₹100 spent on tickets. Points can be redeemed at 1 point = ₹1 for future bookings, subject to a minimum redemption of 50 points.
Loyalty points expire 6 months from the date of issue. Unused points are non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another account.
Wheelchair-accessible seats are available in all theaters. Please contact customer support at least 24 hours before show time to reserve these seats.
Audio description and closed captioning devices are available for select shows. Request these at the time of booking; availability is limited and first-come, first-served.
Entry may be denied for patrons arriving more than 15 minutes after show start time, at the theater's discretion. No refunds will be issued for late arrivals.
Latecomers will only be allowed entry during a suitable break in the film (e.g., after trailers or intermission) to avoid disturbance to other guests.
Group bookings of 20+ tickets require 7 days' advance notice. A 30% non-refundable deposit is required at the time of confirmation.
For group bookings, cancellation policy varies: 75% refund if canceled 7+ days before show, 25% refund if canceled 3-6 days before, no refund if canceled within 48 hours.
Gift cards are valid for 12 months from purchase date and can be used for tickets, food, and beverages. Unused balance after expiry is forfeited.
Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash or used to purchase other gift cards. Lost or stolen cards will not be replaced without proof of purchase.
If a show is interrupted due to technical failure (e.g., power outage, projector issue) for more than 30 minutes, patrons may request a full refund or a complimentary pass for another show.
Refunds for technical disruptions must be requested at the box office within 24 hours of the scheduled show time. No refunds will be processed after this window.
Ticket rescheduling is permitted up to 4 hours before show time, subject to a ₹50 per ticket rescheduling fee and availability in the desired show.
Rescheduled tickets cannot be canceled or rescheduled again. The new show time must be within 7 days of the original booking date.
In case of duplicate booking or system error resulting in overcharge, the excess amount will be refunded within 3 business days after verification.
Premium seats (e.g., sofa, couple seats, director's lounge) have a separate pricing tier and cannot be booked using standard seat vouchers or complimentary passes.
International cards are accepted but may incur a 3.5% cross-border transaction fee. All charges will be processed in local currency (INR).
Theater management may conduct random bag checks for security purposes. Refusal to comply will result in denial of entry without refund.
